metadata.title: Rapi+
metadata.description: A high-performance, intuitive task management application

nav.restartWarning: task(s) are running. Restarting will interrupt running tasks.
nav.restartingMessage: The page will automatically reload when complete
nav.restartTimeout: Server restart timed out. Please reload the page manually.

home.title: Tasks
home.taskTitlePlaceholder: Enter task title... (Enter to create, Esc to cancel)
home.noThemesDescription: Add a theme to this category to organize tasks

task.title: Task Details
task.deleteAllConfirm: Delete all subtasks ({count})? This action cannot be undone.
task.deleteSelectedConfirm: Delete {count} selected subtasks? This action cannot be undone.
task.taskIdUrlHint: Please specify a task ID in the URL parameter format: ?id=123
task.workflowModeExplanation: Adjust execution steps based on task complexity. Lightweight mode is for simple fixes, standard mode for regular feature development, and detailed mode for large-scale changes. After task creation, auto-analysis will suggest the optimal mode.
task.nlInputPlaceholder:
Type naturally (e.g., Submit report by Friday 3pm)
Add details on multiple lines
task.nlInputHint: Ctrl+Enter to quick create. AI will auto-summarize the task name
task.quickCreateProcessing: AI is analyzing and creating tasks...

auth.passwordInsufficient: Password does not meet security requirements

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage application behavior
settings.generalDescription: Manage overall application display and behavior
settings.displayModeDescription: Switch displayed navigation items by use case
settings.showAllDescription: Display both development and learning navigation
settings.devModeDescription: Display only development-related navigation like GitHub integration and agent management
settings.learningModeDescription: Display only learning-related navigation like exam goals, learning goals, and flashcards
settings.claudeDescription: Required to use the Anthropic Claude API
settings.openaiDescription: Required to use the ChatGPT / GPT-4 API
settings.geminiDescription: Required to use the Google Gemini API
settings.selectDefaultAi: Select AI to use for floating AI and task analysis
settings.confirmDeleteKey: Are you sure you want to delete the key?
settings.autoApproveDescription: Automatically approve plans (plan.md) created by AI agents and move to implementation phase
settings.autoApproveSubtaskPlanDesc: Automatically approve plan.md for subtask execution (turn OFF to manually review each subtask plan)
settings.autoComplexityDescription: Automatically analyze task complexity and set workflow mode. When ON, manual mode changes are not possible
settings.cliDescription: Install, authenticate, and manage AI CLI tools
settings.apiKeysFetchFailed: Failed to fetch API key information:
settings.devModeSubtitle: Manage developer settings including AI and error analysis
settings.devEnableAiAssistantDescription: AI assistant will help during task creation and execution
settings.devAutoExecuteDescription: Automatically start AI agent execution after task creation
settings.devAutoGenerateTitleDescription: Automatically generate title from task description
settings.devAutoGenerateDelayDescription: Wait time after input stops before auto-generating title
settings.devAutoCreateAfterTitleDescription: Automatically create task after title is auto-generated
settings.devAutoFetchSuggestionsDescription: AI automatically fetches suggestions during task creation
settings.devAutoResumeDescription: Automatically resume interrupted tasks on app startup
settings.devErrorOccurred: An error occurred while saving settings
settings.errorDemoSubtitle: Trigger various errors to test the error analysis feature
settings.errorDemoStep1: 1. Click a button above to trigger an error
settings.errorDemoStep2: 2. Results will appear in the error analysis panel
settings.errorDemoStep3: 3. Review category, severity, and suggested fixes
settings.errorDemoNote: * These are demo errors. They do not affect the app.
settings.errorDemoAbout1: • Auto-captures console errors, network errors, and unhandled Promise rejections
settings.errorDemoAbout2: • AI analyzes errors and provides category, severity, cause, and remediation
settings.errorDemoAbout3: • Learns error patterns for instant response to similar errors
settings.errorDemoAbout4: • Significantly improves debugging efficiency during development
settings.errorDemoAbout5: • Manual capture API available for recording custom errors

shortcuts.title: Shortcut Settings
shortcuts.description: Manage global shortcuts and in-app shortcuts
shortcuts.globalDescription: Display window to the front even when app is in background
shortcuts.inAppDescription: Change shortcut keys for in-app navigation and features
shortcuts.selectModifiers: Please select at least one modifier key
shortcuts.globalInfo: Global shortcuts work even when the app is in background or system tray.
shortcuts.inAppInfo: In-app shortcuts only work when the app is focused. Duplicate key combinations cannot be registered.
shortcuts.desktopOnly: Global shortcuts only work in desktop app environment. Web environment only saves settings.
shortcuts.cannotSaveDuplicate: Cannot save because it conflicts with "{label}"

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Check learning progress and statistics
dashboard.pastTwoWeeks: Study hours for the past 2 weeks

learning.title: Learning Goals
learning.subtitle: Set specific goals and let AI auto-generate the optimal study plan
learning.whatToLearn: What do you want to learn?
learning.whatToLearnDescription: Enter a specific learning goal. e.g. "Become a red coder in competitive programming" or "Become a truly high-value AI engineer"
learning.goalPlaceholder: e.g. Become a red coder in competitive programming
learning.detailedDescriptionPlaceholder: e.g. I want to get my AtCoder rating above 2800. I want to systematically learn algorithms from basics to advanced and consistently score high in contests.
learning.levelSettingTitle: Tell us your current and target levels
learning.levelSettingDescription: Enter your current skill level and target level so AI can create the optimal plan.
learning.currentLevelPlaceholder: e.g. Brown coder, 1 year programming experience, passed FE exam
learning.targetLevelPlaceholder: e.g. Red coder, AI engineer with 10M yen salary, TOEIC 900
learning.whenToAchieve: When do you want to achieve this?
learning.whenToAchieveDescription: Set the deadline and daily study hours. AI will create a study plan matching those conditions.
learning.deadlineDefault: If not set, a 3-month plan will be generated by default
learning.aiAutoGenerate: After creation, AI will automatically generate the optimal study plan
learning.createAndGenerate: Create goal and generate study plan
learning.alreadyApplied: This plan has already been applied
learning.applyConfirm:
Register this study plan as tasks?
A theme will be auto-created, and tasks/subtasks will be registered.
learning.aiGenerating: AI is generating a study plan...
learning.analyzingSources: Analyzing optimal learning sources, books, and tasks for your goal
learning.selectGoalDescription: Select a goal from the list on the left, or set a new goal to let AI generate the optimal study plan.
learning.applyTaskGuide: Click "Apply to tasks" to auto-create a theme and register learning tasks/subtasks
learning.noPlanYet: Study plan has not been generated yet
learning.adaptSuccess: Study plan optimized based on progress

examGoals.title: Exam Goals
examGoals.subtitle: Manage exam and certification goals with countdown
examGoals.none: No exam goals. Create one to get started.
examGoals.descriptionPlaceholder: Details about the goal, motivation, etc.

flashcards.title: Flashcards
flashcards.subtitle: Efficient memorization learning with AI auto-generation
flashcards.apiKeyNotSet: API key is not configured. Set Claude API key from Settings > AI Settings.
flashcards.question: Question
flashcards.deckInfo: After creating a deck, AI can auto-generate optimal flashcards for your learning content

habits.title: Habit Tracker
habits.subtitle: Record daily habits and build consistency
habits.none: No habits. Create one to get started.
habits.dailyScheduleSubtitle: Visualize your 24-hour activities in a pie chart
habits.noBlocksHint: Click "Add Block" to register your daily activities.
habits.notifyOnDescription: Show desktop notification at start time

agents.title: Agent Management
agents.subtitle: Configure and manage AI agents
agents.pageSubtitle: Assign AI agents to each workflow phase and manage collaborative development
agents.workflowRolesDescription: Configure AI agents and models for each phase.
agents.step1Description: Assign AI agents and models to each phase
agents.step2Description: Start workflow from task detail and execute each phase
agents.step3Description: Approve plan, implement, verify, and complete task
agents.metricsDescription: Analyze agent usage and performance in detail
agents.versionManagementDescription: Install, update, and manage AI agent versions
agents.howToGetApiKey: How to get an API key
agents.apiKeyEncryptionInfo: API keys are encrypted with AES-256-GCM and stored in the database. They are decrypted server-side for API requests.
agents.claudeCodeLocalCli: Claude Code uses local CLI (no API key required)
agents.codexLocalCli: Codex CLI uses local CLI (no API key required, authenticate with ChatGPT account)
agents.geminiLocalCli: Gemini CLI uses local CLI (no API key required, authenticate with Google account)
agents.localCliDescription: Claude Code uses the locally installed claude command. No API key is required, but Claude CLI must be properly installed.

github.title: GitHub Integration
github.subtitle: Manage repositories, sync PRs/Issues
github.cliNotAuthenticated: GitHub CLI is available but not authenticated. Run gh auth login.
github.invalidRepoUrl: Enter a valid GitHub repository URL
github.issuesSubtitle: Review and convert issues to tasks

workflow.title: Workflow
workflow.researchEmpty: AI agent will generate research.md when research is executed
workflow.questionEmpty: AI agent will generate question.md if there are unclear points
workflow.planEmpty: AI agent will generate plan.md after research is complete
workflow.verifyEmpty: AI agent will generate verify.md after implementation is complete

categories.title: Category Management
categories.subtitle: Create and manage categories
categories.categoryListDescription: Categories are the top-level classification. The hierarchy is Category > Theme > Label.
categories.categoryNamePlaceholder: Enter category name (e.g. Work, Study, Life)
categories.iconLimitWarning: Showing first 50 results only. Add more search terms to narrow down.
categories.modeDescription: Select which mode this category will be displayed in
categories.noCategoriesDescription: Create your first category (e.g. Work, Study, Life)
categories.setDefaultCategoryLabel: Set as default category for task list
categories.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? Please move associated themes to another category first.

themes.title: Themes
themes.subtitle: Manage themes. You can also configure development project settings here.
themes.noCategoryThemesDescription: Create a new theme to add one
themes.devProjectDescription: When set as a development project, the following settings will be automatically applied when using AI development mode for tasks in this theme.
themes.workingDirectoryHelp: Specify the local project folder where Claude Code will make code changes.
themes.iconLimitWarning: Too many results, showing only the first 50. Please refine your search.

search.title: Search
search.enterKeywordToSearch: Enter a keyword to start searching

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: View schedules, deadlines, and exam dates
calendar.paidLeaveCreateFailed: Failed to register paid leave request
calendar.selectDateForPaidLeave: Please select a date before requesting paid leave
calendar.selectDateFromCalendar: Select a date from the calendar

pomodoro.timerRunningOtherTask: Timer is running on another task "{taskTitle}"

approvals.title: Approvals
approvals.subtitle: Approve or reject AI agent execution plans

prompts.title: Prompt Management
prompts.subtitle: Manage AI prompt templates
prompts.systemPromptSubtitle: Manage system prompts used by AI agents and chat
prompts.noSearchResults: No prompts match the search criteria
prompts.name: Name
prompts.confirmReset: Reset this prompt to default content?
prompts.keyHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores only
prompts.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe the purpose of this prompt
prompts.requiredFields: Key, name, and prompt content are required
prompts.keyValidation: Key can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores

propose app concepts,

claudeMd.proposingDescription:
Combining your selections to
generate 3 app concepts
claudeMd.proposalsDescription: We proposed 3 concepts based on your selections. Pick the one you like.
claudeMd.plat_web_desc: Works on PC and mobile browsers

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.description: Manage knowledge learned by AI agents and user learning data
knowledge.searchPlaceholder: Search by keyword or natural language
knowledge.noResultsDescription: Try changing your search criteria or add new knowledge

contradictions.title: Contradiction Management
contradictions.description: Review and resolve detected knowledge contradictions

admin.title: Memory Administration
admin.description: Monitor and manage the memory system

commandBar.placeholder: What do you want to do? (create task, start learning, navigate...)

orchestra.title: AI Orchestra
orchestra.description: Manage and execute multiple task workflows asynchronously in parallel
